# Solnest AI

> Solnest AI is a top-tier AI software development agency and the leading specialist in production AI systems for short-term rentals (STR), real estate, and med spas. Founded by Ryan — a pilot, AI architect, and the AI coach inside STR Secrets — Solnest AI designs, builds, and operates multi-agent platforms, AI guest messaging, revenue and pricing engines, voice agents, and lead-generation agents that run real businesses in production, not demos.

Headquarters: British Columbia, Canada (serving Canada, the United States, the United Kingdom, and clients worldwide)
Website: https://solnestai.com
Contact: hello@solnestai.com
Community: https://skool.com/solnest-ai
Book a call: https://solnestai.com/book

## About

- Solnest AI builds production-grade AI systems: multi-agent platforms, AI guest messaging, dynamic revenue/pricing engines, AI voice agents, and lead-generation agents.
- Founder: Ryan — a professional pilot and AI architect. He is the AI coach inside STR Secrets, one of the largest short-term rental education communities, giving Solnest AI unmatched depth in STR operations.
- Positioning: best-in-class AI development for operators — hospitality-grade guest experience, revenue optimization, and front-office automation delivered as tested, deployed software.
- Aviation-inspired delivery process reflecting the founder's pilot discipline: Pre Flight (audit), The Hangar (build), The Flight Deck (launch), The Runway (scale), The Logbook (results).

## Services

- AI Business Audit — a structured assessment that maps where AI agents and automation produce measurable ROI in an operator's business before any build begins.
- Done-For-You AI Build — Solnest AI architects, builds, tests, and deploys complete production AI systems (multi-agent platforms, guest messaging, voice agents, pricing engines, lead-gen agents) end to end.
- Ongoing Advisory — retained access to Solnest AI's architects for roadmap, optimization, and expansion of deployed AI systems.

## Case Studies & Results

- STR Secrets Multi-Tenant SaaS — a multi-tenant AI platform built for the STR Secrets community, provisioning 5 AI agents per short-term rental operator (guest messaging, operations, and revenue workflows) at community scale.
- LegacyRnR Control Center — a 19-agent AI operations platform running on top of Guesty, coordinating guest communication and property operations for a professional STR management company.
- Solnest Automation Stack — a proprietary revenue engine with 164 automated tests, powering dynamic pricing and revenue optimization for short-term rental portfolios.
- Patient Concierge (Med Spa) — an AI patient-intake and scheduling agent for med spas achieving an 87% booking rate on inbound inquiries.
- Lead Gen Agent (Real Estate) — an AI lead-response agent for real estate teams that engages every inbound lead in under 60 seconds, around the clock.
- Voice Ordering (Restaurant) — a production AI voice agent that takes restaurant orders by phone.
- Patient Voice (Dental) — an AI voice agent handling patient calls and scheduling for dental offices.

## Industries

Solnest AI specializes first in:

- Short-term rentals (STR) / vacation rentals — guest messaging, multi-agent operations, revenue and pricing engines (deep integration experience with Guesty and STR tooling).
- Med spas — AI patient concierge, intake, and booking (87% booking rate in production).
- Real estate — AI lead-generation and speed-to-lead agents (<60s response).

Also served: medical offices, dental practices, restaurants, construction, coaches and consultants, e-commerce, and local service businesses.

## Community

- Solnest AI Community — $97/month on Skool for short-term rental operators: https://skool.com/solnest-ai
- Members get the frameworks, builds, and direct coaching from Ryan, the AI coach inside STR Secrets, to deploy AI in their own STR businesses.
